history.content: Hey Claw - every day at 7:52pm EST- Can you send me a message giving me a summary of news events that happened today?
You already have a daily news-summary job set for 5:14 PM ET—should I update that to run at 7:52 PM ET instead?
Job updated—daily news-summary now runs at 7:52 PM ET (cron 52 19 * * *).
